items.title: Notabene Flow what makes it different
items.snippet: I have been researching stablecoin B2B payment infrastructure for a few months now, trying to decide which platform makes sense for a fintech that handles cross-border payouts for enterprise clients. The usual suspects like Circle Payments Network, BVNK, and the newly absorbed Bridge into Stripe Crypto all have strong offerings, but they are effectively closed gardens tied to specific issuers or rails. That is where Notabene Flow comes in, and after digging into the details, the differentiators...

items.title: Tether, Nvidia and Amazon Back Humanoid Robotics Firm NEURA in $1.4 Billion Funding Round
items.snippet: Stablecoin giant Tether led a massive Series C round for German robotics firm NEURA, which will embed crypto payment tools and edge AI.
items.author: Decrypt Agent

items.title: Tether Leads Up to $1.4 Billion Round in Robotics Firm Neura, Plans to Embed Crypto Wallets in Machines
items.snippet: Tether is leading a round of up to $1.4 billion in German robotics firm Neura Robotics, one of the largest physical-AI rounds on record, and will embed its WDK self-custodial wallet kit and QVAC edge-AI runtime into the robots. The post Tether Leads Up to $1.4 Billion Round in Robotics Firm Neura, Plans to Embed Crypto Wallets in Machines appeared first on Unchained .
items.author: Aakash Girimath

coverage_notes: X/Twitter direct monitoring is not enabled because official API read access is paid. This dashboard avoids scraping or bypassing access controls.
Bluesky search uses the public endpoint when available. If it returns 403, add free-account BSKY_IDENTIFIER and BSKY_APP_PASSWORD repository secrets.
Reddit RSS and Mastodon public search may be rate-limited or incomplete depending on the platform.
YouTube search is optional and only runs when a free-quota YOUTUBE_API_KEY secret is configured.
